markdown:
[Skip to content](https://innerpeace.vision/disc-personal-profile-system/#main)

# DISC Personal Profile System

**Responding**

1\. Study the four descriptive words in the first group of words while thinking about the work behavioral tendencies you show in the work setting. To get a better understanding of the four descriptive words turn to page.

2\. **Select only one word that MOST** Describes you. Click on the button on the symbol chosen.

3\. **Select only one word that LEAST** Describes you. Click on the button on the symbol chosen.

**[Click here to read the Disc Word Explanation](https://innerpeace.vision/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/DISC-WORD-EXPLANATION.pdf)**

**EXAMPLE 1.**

The individual in Example 1 tends to be most Persuasive and least Original.

![](https://innerpeace.vision/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Screenshot.png)

## DISC Personal Profile System Form

Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form.
